children.text: S C H O L L Y
Many scholarships have very broad requirements. It may initially seem like you don't qualify for a particular scholarship, but you really might!
Lots of the essays required for scholarships have very similar prompts. Write a general-purpose essay and tweak it for all your scholarship applications!
Discuss your involvement in and contributions to a community
Choose your most meaningful community service, describe it and how you and the community benefited
In what areas have you acquired knowledge or skills
